Document:
# Minor Antagonists
Minor Antagonists are ghost-controlled roles that give dead players a second chance to interact around the station. They are spawned by random events and typically have narrower goals than full antagonists.
## Types of Minor Antagonists
- [textlink="Paradox Clone" link="ParadoxClone"]: a perfect copy of a crewmember with one objective — find and kill the original. - [textlink="Revenant" link="Revenant"]: an ethereal being that drains life essence from crew members to grow in power. - [textlink="Rat King" link="RatKing"]: an oversized rodent that builds and commands armies of rats. - [textlink="Slimes and Spiders" link="AngryMobs"]: hostile creatures that attack anything that moves.
